summary: A Go-based CLI tool with a plugin system that detects conditions, runs assertions, and generates JUnit reports, likely for Kubernetes infrastructure validation.
concerns: recent commits are entirely automated agent metadata churn with no functional changes
key hot files are test files, suggesting core logic may be poorly documented or tested by example
staged changes mixed with automated agent commits risk noisy git history
suggestions: ignore or filter automated agent tracking commits from main branch history
add inline documentation to core runner and detector logic
review the 1 staged file to ensure it is a meaningful functional change
